    U

    UIUtil - Class in Screen.UI
    UItil for create pixelFont
    UIUtil() - Constructor for class Screen.UI.UIUtil
     
    Uni1 - Variable in class Logic.MapCreate
     
    Uni2 - Variable in class Logic.MapCreate
     
    updateEducationItem(int) - Method in class Logic.GamePane
    update item on status bar that change to active or upgrade (education thing)
    updateInventoryDisplay(Item) - Method in class Screen.Game.StatusTab
    for update Inventory Display bar for every Item
    updatePlayerPosition() - Method in class Logic.GamePane
    update playerPosition
    updateRound(int, int) - Method in class Screen.Game.Gamebar
    update game round when endRound
    updateStatus() - Method in class Screen.Game.StatusTab
    for update status bar for every status
